overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a medieval village at night, holding a torch. The character moves from a narrow cobblestone street through a stone archway into a bustling market square, passing timber-framed buildings, merchant stalls, and various NPCs before approaching a tavern.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow village street with timber-framed houses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily with torch through narrow village street, passing closely by timber buildings

notable_agents.action: guard in red armor standing motionless beside the timber building

entered.detail: dark wooden medieval building with timber framing and red accents
low stone foundation wall running along the building

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through a narrow medieval village street at night, torch illuminating the wet cobblestones and timber-framed buildings. A guard stands motionless to the right as the character approaches a distant stone archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: town square with stone archway and distant tower

events.description: passes through stone archway into open town square with distant tower visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway into the open square, heading toward the market area

notable_agents.action: woman in dress walking near the stone archway

entered.detail: large stone archway with red roof tiles marking the entrance to the square
tall stone tower visible in the distance against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the scene opens into a wider town square. The distant tower rises against the stormy night sky while scattered villagers walk about. The cobblestone street continues through this transitional space.

scene_state.functional_zone: market square with merchant stalls and wooden carts

events.description: enters bustling market area with wooden stalls and merchant carts

agents.ego_description: walking through the market square past browsing villagers and merchant stalls

notable_agents.action: merchant standing behind wooden fruit stall
villager in green dress walking past the character

entered.detail: wooden stall with canvas canopy selling goods
large wooden wagon with wheels parked near the stalls
market stall displaying fruits and vegetables in crates

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a lively market square filled with wooden stalls and carts. Merchants tend their goods while villagers browse. The distant tower shifts to the left as the character progresses toward a tavern visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: tavern entrance with hanging sign and covered market pavilion

events.description: approaches tavern with hanging sign and enters covered market area

agents.ego_description: approaching the tavern entrance and walking past the covered market stall with red canopy

notable_agents.action: shirtless man standing on stone steps near the tavern

entered.detail: two-story timber tavern with lit windows and wooden balcony
decorative hanging sign suspended in front of the tavern entrance
covered wooden pavilion with red scalloped canopy where people gather

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a timber tavern with a prominent hanging sign, passing stone steps where villagers gather. The scene shifts to a covered market stall with a distinctive red canopy, where several NPCs stand and sit, creating a social hub at the edge of the square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic medieval alleyway into a sprawling, lively town square at night. It begins with Geralt walking down a narrow street where a torch illuminates wet cobblestones and timber-framed buildings, passing a motionless guard while heading toward a distant stone archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the space opens into a wider transitional area where a tall tower looms against a stormy sky and scattered villagers appear. The scene then expands into a bustling market square filled with wooden stalls and carts, with the distant tower shifting to the left as the character progresses toward a tavern. Finally, the movement leads past stone steps and a timber tavern sign toward a social hub beneath a distinctive red canopy where several NPCs gather.
